updates.summary: This is a minor version update for framer-motion with no provided changelog information. Minor updates typically include new features and bug fixes without breaking existing functionality. The risk is relatively low given the mature state of this library and the minor version increment.
ramifications: Potential new features or improvements may be available
Bug fixes may resolve existing issues
Testing recommended to ensure animations continue to work as expected

updates.summary: This is a low-risk minor update that adds a new 'blender' icon to the lucide-react icon library. The change is purely additive with no breaking changes or modifications to existing functionality.
ramifications: New 'blender' icon becomes available for use
Bundle size may increase slightly due to additional icon

updates.summary: This is a minor version update for TypeScript definitions for Node.js with no changelog provided. Type definition packages typically have very low risk as they don't affect runtime behavior, only compile-time type checking. The minor version bump suggests potential new type definitions or improvements to existing ones.
ramifications: Potential new TypeScript type definitions for newer Node.js features
Possible improvements to existing type definitions for better accuracy
May require TypeScript recompilation but no runtime changes expected

updates.summary: This patch release contains three bug fixes addressing a stack overflow issue in no-floating-promises rule, error handling improvements in project-service, and type export resolution for pnpm compatibility. All changes are fixes with no breaking changes or new features.
ramifications: Stack overflow fix may change behavior for recursive types with no-floating-promises rule
Error handling improvements may provide more detailed error information
Type export changes may affect TypeScript compilation in pnpm environments

updates.summary: This patch release contains only bug fixes, including a critical stack overflow fix in the no-floating-promises rule and improvements to error handling. No breaking changes or new features are introduced, making this a safe upgrade.
ramifications: Fixes stack overflow issue when using recursive types with no-floating-promises rule
Improved error reporting in project service configuration parsing
Better TypeScript compatibility for pnpm users through exported types

updates.summary: This is a low-risk minor update that adds new features and fixes bugs without breaking changes. The update enhances the for-direction rule to check sequence expressions, adds a new includeIgnoreFile() function to eslint/config, and fixes several minor issues including deprecated rule replacement handling.
ramifications: Enhanced for-direction rule may catch additional linting violations in code using sequence expressions in for loops
New includeIgnoreFile() function in eslint/config provides additional configuration capabilities
Improved handling of deprecated rule replacements may affect rule migration workflows
Debug output changes for code path DOT labels may affect debugging tools that parse ESLint output

advisories.summary: Withdrawn Advisory: eslint has a Stack Overflow when serializing objects with circular references
